datasets.name: LibriTTS-R
datasets.redistribution: CC BY 4.0; raw subset is not bundled
datasets.selection: dev_clean only; quality-filtered manifest, not full 585-hour corpus
datasets.model_distribution: allowed with attribution; checkpoint may be distributed

datasets.name: VocalSet 1.2
datasets.redistribution: CC BY 4.0; raw audio is not bundled
datasets.selection: filtered scales, arpeggios, long tones, and excerpts; no blind full-corpus training
datasets.model_distribution: allowed with attribution; checkpoint may be distributed

datasets.name: Zeroth-Korean SLR40
datasets.redistribution: CC BY 4.0; raw subset is not bundled
datasets.selection: four speakers, 100 utterances each; Korean phoneme/acoustic prior only, not singing
datasets.model_distribution: allowed with attribution; checkpoint may be distributed

datasets.name: Emilia original
datasets.redistribution: access may be shared only with colleagues accepting gated terms; upstream does not own source copyright
datasets.model_distribution: excluded from production checkpoint to avoid NC/copyright ambiguity

datasets.name: Emilia-YODAS
datasets.redistribution: CC BY 4.0; raw audio is not bundled
datasets.selection: none; 2.1 TB source and raw-origin risk make it unnecessary for the first bounded experiment
datasets.model_distribution: potentially allowed after per-item provenance review

datasets.name: JVS
datasets.redistribution: not permitted except a small public sample allowance
datasets.model_distribution: excluded from production checkpoint without commercial permission

datasets.name: GTSinger
datasets.model_distribution: excluded so production checkpoint is not forced into NC-SA terms

datasets.name: Children's Song Dataset
datasets.model_distribution: excluded from the redistributable production checkpoint

datasets.name: JVS-MuSiC
datasets.redistribution: not permitted except a small public sample allowance
datasets.model_distribution: excluded from production checkpoint without commercial permission

datasets.name: SingNet
datasets.model_distribution: excluded until an official compatible data/model license is verified
